description: Style NoteInspired by the primal attitudes these sandals from catwalk are an excellent substitute for those stilettos that pinch your feet. The soft footbed and understated high fashion design make this an off-duty essentialHeel: 2.5"Product DetailsWide thong style straps with a toe separatorRivets, stitch detailing and wooden beading on the strapsSoft footbed for instep comfortTPU outsole with textured patterning and a heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
